reviews.comment:
Buena parada, para descansar y llenar el tanque. Tenés 2 opciones para comer. El edificio del ACA o el de Full de YPF

(Translated by Google)
Good stop to rest and fill up. You have two options for food: the ACA building or the YPF Full station.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atencion. Buena opcion para cargar combustible y hacer una parada tecnica para tomar algo o comer algo y continuae viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. A good option for refueling and making a pit stop for a drink or a bite to eat before continuing your journey.

reviews.comment:
Me encantó! Los mantecados de esa estación son una delicia. Si pasás por Chascomus te recomiendo esta estación

(Translated by Google)
I loved it! The shortbread cookies from that station are delicious. If you're ever in Chascomús, I highly recommend this station.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Al fte algunas sillas c/ sombrillas. Baños limpios. Detrás de la YPF hay un terreno con mesas y bancos de cemento donde alimentarse. Y estacionar a la sombra. Queda al costado de la Ruta, hay que estar atento para ubicarla.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. There are some chairs and umbrellas in front. Clean bathrooms. Behind the YPF, there's a lot with cement tables and benches where you can eat. And you can park in the shade. It's on the side of the highway; you have to be careful to find it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSOExPdzZ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Hacia 30años que no pasaba por ahí . Una lastima antes era Hemoso el lugar. La atención muy buena...

(Translated by Google)
It had been about 30 years since I'd been there. It's a shame, it used to be such a beautiful place. The service was very good...
